requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Cape Verde PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——佛得角光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——維德角光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Cape Verde PV inverter submissions should be prepared with IEC/EU-style EMC evidence suitable for IGQPI standards practice, ARME/ELECTRA project review, and EPC or lender procurement. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series tests address emissions, immunity, harmonics, and flicker. Because Cape Verde's grid voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, EMC and harmonic evidence should identify the tested voltage, phase configuration, firmware mode, filter configuration, and model rating. China 220/380 V test conditions should not be presented as identical to Cape Verde voltage conditions.
summary.zh: 佛得角光伏逆变器提交资料应准备适用于IGQPI标准实践、ARME/ELECTRA项目审查以及EPC或贷款方采购的IEC/EU风格EMC证据。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准，IEC 61000系列测试覆盖发射、抗扰度、谐波和闪烁。由于佛得角电网为50 Hz、230/400 V，EMC和谐波证据应标明测试电压、相制、固件模式、滤波配置和型号额定值。中国220/380 V测试条件不应被表述为与佛得角电压条件相同。
summary.zht: 維德角光伏逆變器提交資料應準備適用於IGQPI標準實務、ARME/ELECTRA項目審查以及EPC或貸款方採購的IEC/EU風格EMC證據。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準，IEC 61000系列測試覆蓋發射、抗擾度、諧波和閃爍。由於維德角電網為50 Hz、230/400 V，EMC和諧波證據應標明測試電壓、相制、韌體模式、濾波配置和型號額定值。中國220/380 V測試條件不應被表述為與維德角電壓條件相同。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, harmonic, and flicker test methods
IGQPI standards and conformity-assessment practice for Cape Verde
ARME/ELECTRA project review expectations for utility-connected PV equipment

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and related GB/T or IEC-derived EMC methods tested by Chinese laboratories. These documents can be useful technical background, but they are not automatically accepted in Cape Verde as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence unless the reports explicitly cover the same IEC clauses, model configuration, and test conditions required by the project reviewer.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相关GB/T或IEC衍生EMC方法，由中国实验室测试。这些文件可作为有用技术背景，但若报告未明确覆盖项目审查方要求的相同IEC条款、型号配置和测试条件，不会在佛得角被自动接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及相關GB/T或IEC衍生EMC方法，由中國實驗室測試。這些文件可作為有用技術背景，但若報告未明確覆蓋項目審查方要求的相同IEC條款、型號配置和測試條件，不會在維德角被自動接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: provide IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series EMC reports for the supplied inverter model, including the tested AC voltage and phase configuration. If the existing China EMC file was tested under 220/380 V settings, ask the Cape Verde EPC, ELECTRA interface reviewer, or lender engineer whether 230/400 V retesting, engineering justification, or a configuration statement is required.
gap.zh: 差距：应提供所供逆变器型号的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列EMC报告，并包含测试交流电压和相制。若既有中国EMC文件基于220/380 V设置测试，应向佛得角EPC、ELECTRA接口审查方或贷款方工程师确认是否需要230/400 V复测、工程论证或配置声明。
gap.zht: 差距：應提供所供逆變器型號的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列EMC報告，並包含測試交流電壓和相制。若既有中國EMC文件基於220/380 V設置測試，應向維德角EPC、ELECTRA接口審查方或貸款方工程師確認是否需要230/400 V複測、工程論證或配置聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where IGQPI, ARME/ELECTRA, EPC, or lender documentation requires IEC/EU-style EMC evidence for grid-connected PV equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence under GB/T or NB/T standards is not automatically accepted as Cape Verde IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence

source.publisher: IGQPI (Instituto de Gestao da Qualidade e da Propriedade Intelectual)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC certificates as a complete Cape Verde EMC package. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the exact model and configuration, and disclose whether testing was at China 220/380 V or Cape Verde 230/400 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC证书作为完整佛得角EMC文件包。请为具体型号和配置准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据，并披露测试是在中国220/380 V还是佛得角230/400 V条件下完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004 EMC證書作為完整維德角EMC文件包。請為具體型號和配置準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據，並披露測試是在中國220/380 V還是維德角230/400 V條件下完成。
